label: orders
sql: SELECT o.order_id, o.order_date, o.region, o.customer, o.status, o.promised_date, o.actual_ship_date, o.net_total FROM orders o WHERE o.order_date >= :since

label: orders:count
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT o.order_id, o.order_date, o.region, o.customer, o.status, o.promised_date, o.actual_ship_date, o.net_total FROM orders o WHERE o.order_date >= :since ) t

label: order_lines
sql: SELECT l.order_id, l.item_code, l.qty FROM order_lines l JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = l.order_id WHERE o.order_date >= :since

label: order_lines:count
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT l.order_id, l.item_code, l.qty FROM order_lines l JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = l.order_id WHERE o.order_date >= :since ) t

label: inventory
sql: SELECT i.item_code, i.stock_qty FROM inventory i

label: inventory:count
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT i.item_code, i.stock_qty FROM inventory i ) t
